query: SELECT id, dataExame, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') as pesoFetal, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.biometria') as biometria FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 1560002 AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.observacoes') LIKE '%TESTE_%' ORDER BY dataExame ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT id, dataExame, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') as pesoFetal, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.biometria') as biometria FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 1560002 AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.observacoes') LIKE '%TESTE_%' ORDER BY dataExame ASC;
